reason: No active canonical frontier_research item existed; additive queue history showed R-005 through R-007 completed, so this records the next non-duplicative slice without overwriting shared state.

proposed_item.action: Fuse render, playback, output-route, and physical audibility evidence into a contradiction-aware diagnostic gate.

progress.finding: No browser telemetry channel alone proves audibility. Convergence and contradiction across render advance, playback counters, route availability, and physical observation determine the next defensible diagnostic action.
progress.verification: 6 deterministic Node tests passed in an isolated runtime.

proposed_item.handoff: Vercel Studio should adapt its existing render, playback-stat, route, and physical-observation outputs to these categorical inputs and retain the fusion result beside exact commit and deployment identity. A browser_path_progressing result must not be reported as audible without physical observation.
